title: 修复无活动工单状态生成一致性

sources.reason: Generates the persisted no-active Cockpit status.
Defines the CI invariant that persisted no-active status must match live changes.
Existing regression coverage for no-active status generation.

riskAssessment.reason: The generated status is a lifecycle artifact consumed by local and CI gates; active status behavior must remain unchanged.

executionDecision.reason: The CI failure is reproducible from repository behavior and has a bounded implementation and test scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review that active Work Item status generation still reports owned changes and only no-active status suppresses transient changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: No-active Cockpit status always persists Worktree Changes absent, count 0, and Ownership Preview clean.
Active Work Item status generation retains its existing ownership and worktree reporting behavior.
Regression tests cover no-active generation with repository changes and pass in the project quality suite.
Cockpit lifecycle documentation no longer claims that no-active status persists a transient worktree signal.
guidelines: Keep generated status files generated by commands; do not hand-edit current_status.md.
Preserve active Work Item status semantics while changing no-active serialization.
Keep the fix minimal and cover the changed behavior with an automated regression test.

intent.problem: A clean CI checkout can contain a committed no-active status that falsely reports one changed file because the status was generated while an archive operation was still dirty.
constraints: Do not change active Work Item status semantics.
Keep current_status.md generated and do not rewrite historical archive evidence.
intent.rationale: No-active status is a lifecycle marker, not an archive-time snapshot. Removing transient worktree values from its persisted representation makes the status deterministic after archive and satisfies the consistency gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: no-active generation while archive files are changing
evidence: Regression test asserts the persisted no-active fields remain absent/0/clean despite changed paths.
Existing active status ownership test remains in the project suite.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continued remediation of the review-backed CI blocker, including aligned governance documentation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
